actions.value:
An OTC (over-the-counter) trade is typically when someone works closely with an exchange service to make larger orders without overpaying in fees. With a more hands-on approach, you will have them available to answer questions and guide you throughout the process.

 

At this time, Edge has partnered with 's OTC desk to provide our users with a larger purchasing limit option. If you are interested, please reach out to otc@__.com and CC: support@edge.app - Let them know you're with Edge and would like to make a crypto purchase. Also state which asset you would like, and how much of it.

 

Let us know if you have other questions for Edge. Any feedback on your OTC experience with __ would be greatly appreciated as well.
